mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in labor demand signals an expansionary fiscal policy cycle that boosts aggregate supply, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decrease in the labor force participation rate signals a contractionary monetary policy cycle that reduces aggregate demand, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in contraction periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the federal funds rate signals an expansionary monetary policy cycle that boosts aggregate demand, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in contraction periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
